data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. TELL ME IM SPECIAL finished third at this track two runs ago before finishing sixth at her latest appearance over 1609m at this track, beaten 25 metres. Interesting to see what unfolds from this wide draw. Finds a suitable assignment and can find winning form. 4. MS COMEGOGETHER resumes here after closing her last campaign with a sixth at this track on October 14. Talented and has plenty of upside. Capable of playing a major role so has to be respected. 7. STRAIGHTAWAY JO didn't do a bad job when sixth over 1609m at this track last time out. 6. CAPTAIN LIZZIE is worth some thought after her last-start fifth over 1609m at this track on April 9.","runners":[8,4,7,6],"exclusive":false}
